---
title: "Project title (replace)"
# Optional: body-class: portfolio-project-page
---

<!-- 
  Copy this file when adding a new interactive project page.
  Tab order: Final product → Project Overview → Project Approach → Scripts & Code → Impact & Outcome
  Replace placeholder panels; keep ids: portfolio-final-product, portfolio-overview, portfolio-approach, portfolio-scripts, portfolio-impact
  Button classes: portfolio-btn-product, portfolio-btn-overview, portfolio-btn-approach, portfolio-btn-scripts, portfolio-btn-impact
  On the Quarto page that becomes REPLACE.html (the iframe target), add under format.html:
    include-in-header: ../../includes/portfolio-site-embed-chrome.html
  (adjust the relative path from that .qmd to repo includes/) so the site navbar and footer hide when embedded but stay when opened in a new tab.
-->

<div class="portfolio-project-page-root" hidden aria-hidden="true"></div>

:::: {.portfolio-view-toggle role="group" aria-label="Switch view"}
<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary portfolio-btn-product" aria-pressed="true">Final product</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary portfolio-btn-overview" aria-pressed="false">Project Overview</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary portfolio-btn-approach" aria-pressed="false">Project Approach</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary portfolio-btn-scripts" aria-pressed="false">Scripts & Code</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary portfolio-btn-impact" aria-pressed="false">Impact & Outcome</button>
::::

::: {.portfolio-page-intro}
::: {.portfolio-accent-rule}
:::
One-sentence project summary that explains what this final product does and why it matters.
:::

::: {.portfolio-meta-row}
[Tooling]{.portfolio-meta-chip}
[Domain]{.portfolio-meta-chip}
[Outcome]{.portfolio-meta-chip}
:::

:::: {#portfolio-final-product .portfolio-view-panel}
:::: {.portfolio-embed-bar}
[Open project in new tab](REPLACE.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary target="_blank" rel="noopener"}
::::
:::: {#portfolio-iframe-wrap .portfolio-embed-full}
<iframe src="REPLACE.html" title="Project embed" class="portfolio-embed" allowfullscreen style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;left:0;top:0;border:0;"></iframe>
::::
::::

:::: {#portfolio-overview .portfolio-view-panel .d-none}
## Project Overview

*The story (WHAT): problem, context, goals, stakeholders, final deliverable. Keep technical HOW out of this tab-use **Project Approach** and **Scripts & Code**.*

### Problem

### Context

### Goals

### Stakeholders

### Final deliverable

::::

:::: {#portfolio-approach .portfolio-view-panel .d-none}
## Project Approach

*The thinking (HOW): scope, assumptions, data, design, workflow, constraints. Pre-build planning note: write this **before** the deliverable exists. Use **past tense** for the situation that motivates the work; use **future / “will” / “planned”** for what you intend to build.*

### Problem Definition

- **Context (often past):** what the situation was / what was missing.
- **Gap:** what the project will address.

### Scope & Assumptions

- **Scope (planned):** in / out.
- **Assumptions:** what you will treat as given.

### Data Sources

- **Planned inputs:** systems, files, APIs, or manual steps.

### Analytical Design

- **Plan:** methods, models, or UX logic-and why they fit.

### Workflow / Process

1. Planned step one  
2. Planned step two  
3. Planned step three  

### Constraints & Considerations

- Risks, privacy, performance, or policy limits you will design around.
::::

:::: {#portfolio-scripts .portfolio-view-panel .d-none}
## Example script {#script-example}

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| file: path/to/script.R
```
::::

:::: {#portfolio-impact .portfolio-view-panel .d-none}
## Impact & Outcome

Who benefited and what changed as a result.
::::

<script>
(function() {
  var productPanel = document.getElementById('portfolio-final-product');
  var overviewPanel = document.getElementById('portfolio-overview');
  var approachPanel = document.getElementById('portfolio-approach');
  var scriptsPanel = document.getElementById('portfolio-scripts');
  var impactPanel = document.getElementById('portfolio-impact');
  var btnProduct = document.querySelector('.portfolio-btn-product');
  var btnOverview = document.querySelector('.portfolio-btn-overview');
  var btnApproach = document.querySelector('.portfolio-btn-approach');
  var btnScripts = document.querySelector('.portfolio-btn-scripts');
  var btnImpact = document.querySelector('.portfolio-btn-impact');
  if (!productPanel || !overviewPanel || !approachPanel || !scriptsPanel || !impactPanel || !btnProduct || !btnOverview || !btnApproach || !btnScripts || !btnImpact) return;

  function setActive(btn) {
    [btnProduct, btnOverview, btnApproach, btnScripts, btnImpact].forEach(function(b) {
      b.classList.remove('btn-primary');
      b.classList.add('btn-outline-primary');
      b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
    });
    btn.classList.add('btn-primary');
    btn.classList.remove('btn-outline-primary');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
  }
  function showProduct() {
    productPanel.classList.remove('d-none');
    overviewPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    approachPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    scriptsPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    impactPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    setActive(btnProduct);
  }
  function showOverview() {
    productPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    overviewPanel.classList.remove('d-none');
    approachPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    scriptsPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    impactPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    setActive(btnOverview);
  }
  function showApproach() {
    productPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    overviewPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    approachPanel.classList.remove('d-none');
    scriptsPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    impactPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    setActive(btnApproach);
  }
  function showScripts() {
    productPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    overviewPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    approachPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    scriptsPanel.classList.remove('d-none');
    impactPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    setActive(btnScripts);
  }
  function showImpact() {
    productPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    overviewPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    approachPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    scriptsPanel.classList.add('d-none');
    impactPanel.classList.remove('d-none');
    setActive(btnImpact);
  }

  btnProduct.addEventListener('click', showProduct);
  btnOverview.addEventListener('click', showOverview);
  btnApproach.addEventListener('click', showApproach);
  btnScripts.addEventListener('click', showScripts);
  btnImpact.addEventListener('click', showImpact);
})();
</script>
